home-page.bio: Currently building <linka>Linka Eventos</linka> as a Full Stack Developer at <pecege>Pecege</pecege>, working remotely from Campina Grande, Brasil. I collect <records>records</records> and I'm almost always <song>listening</song>, reading, watching or playing something. I also <writing>write</writing> occasionally.
